untranslatable_reason: This signal requires fundamental data (book-to-market ratio, book value from COMPUSTAT, market value from CRSP) and portfolio construction logic (decile formation, cross-sectional ranking, long/short positioning) that are not available in the allowed technical indicators list. The strategy involves annual rebalancing based on fundamental ratios and universe-wide ranking, which cannot be expressed using price, volume, or technical indicator conditions.
translation_notes: SSRN_227016_4 is a classic Fama-French value factor strategy based on book-to-market deciles. This requires: (1) fundamental data access (book value, market cap), (2) cross-sectional ranking across the full universe, (3) portfolio construction and weighting logic, and (4) annual rebalancing mechanics. These are portfolio-level operations that fall outside the scope of single-stock technical indicator rules. This signal requires a separate fundamental/factor-based backtest engine, not a technical indicator rule engine.
